bullets: Ingress: slot index 0 is the rightmost orb (channel / evoke order for this UI).
Hover a chip for passive and evoke text from the current fight.

Lightning.passive_detail: End of turn: deal passive_amount damage to a random enemy (includes Focus).
Lightning.evoke_detail: Evoke: deal evoke_amount damage to a random enemy (includes Focus).

Frost.passive_detail: End of turn: gain passive_amount Block (includes Focus).

Dark.short: Scaling damage orb — lowest HP target on evoke.
Dark.passive_detail: End of turn: increases stored damage (mod reports in passive_amount / related fields; includes scaling).
Dark.evoke_detail: Evoke: deal current stored damage to enemy with lowest HP (leftmost if tied).

Plasma.short: Energy orb — not scaled by Focus.
Plasma.passive_detail: Start of turn: gain Energy from passive (mod value; typically 1).
Plasma.evoke_detail: Evoke: gain Energy (mod value; typically 2). Plasma ignores Focus.
